title: Growth Energy to USDA: Maximize Flexibility on CSA
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade association, presented recommendations on how to improve and implement the U.S. Department of Agricultureâ€™s (USDA) interim guidelines on climate-smart, or regenerative, agriculture practices today. The agency is currently reviewing the Interim Rule on Technical Guidelines for Climate-Smart Agriculture (CSA) Crops Used as Biofuel Feedstocks.
author: Analysts Account
